ancestry: html > body > main:nth-child(2) > section:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > h1:nth-child(2)

html > body > main:nth-child(2) > section:nth-child(3) > div:nth-child(2) > h2:nth-child(1)
html > body > main:nth-child(2) > section:nth-child(3) > div:nth-child(3) > article:nth-child(1) > h3:nth-child(2)
html > body > main:nth-child(2) > section:nth-child(3) > div:nth-child(3) > article:nth-child(2) > h3:nth-child(2)
html > body > main:nth-child(2) > section:nth-child(3) > div:nth-child(3) > article:nth-child(3) > h3:nth-child(2)
html > body > main:nth-child(2) > section:nth-child(4) > div > div:nth-child(1) > h2:nth-child(2)
html > body > main:nth-child(2) > section:nth-child(5) > div > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > h2:nth-child(2)
html > body > main:nth-child(2) > section:nth-child(6) > div > div:nth-child(1) > h2:nth-child(2)
